description_long: This apartment building is a large, rectangular structure with a central open courtyard, surrounded by multiple wings forming a perimeter block. The exterior features a mix of light gray and beige facades, punctuated by regularly spaced windows and several orange balcony railings. The roof is flat and dark red, providing a stark contrast to the lighter walls below. The building appears to have four stories, with each floor displaying a consistent window arrangement and some visible balconies. The ground level includes several entrances, likely leading to different stairwells or lobbies. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A large, rectangular apartment building with a central courtyard, flat red roof, and regularly spaced windows and balconies on a light facade.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the building's depth, central courtyard, and a mix of window and balcony arrangements along the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade with evenly spaced windows and several entrances at ground level.
description_view_2: Oblique view from the opposite side, revealing the courtyard's shape and more balcony details.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the full width of the building, central courtyard opening, and symmetrical window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all facades, interspersed with occasional balconies.
